summary: Energetic Vegas casino show captured from an unknown source, praised for its early‑set hook and a memorable Jerry Garcia U.S. Blues moment.
review: Fans give this recording five‑star marks, noting how the first set grabs you instantly and that the performance feels special as the last time casinos let the Dead in. Jerry’s rendition of "U.S. Blues" is singled out as a highlight, while no technical complaints suggest the audio quality is at least good enough for enthusiastic listening.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers award five stars and focus on the musical excitement; no negative or technical issues are mentioned, indicating both a strong show and an acceptable recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not comment on sound quality, implying the audio is satisfactory for enjoyment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners report being hooked halfway through the first set, indicating a compelling early momentum and overall positive pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Highlighted for an inspiring performance of "U.S. Blues" that reviewers wish they could hear live again.
